subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate Partner Corp's interest in exploring a collaboration.

We'd be happy to arrange an introductory call. Here are a few slots that work on our end:

• April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which works best for you, and we'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact details — I'm afraid we're unable to share internal directory information or direct phone lines. However, rest assured that the appropriate stakeholders will be included as our discussions progress.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
